stories.headline: OpenAI and Dell Partner to Deploy Codex in Enterprise On-Premises Environments
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI and Dell announced a multi-year deal to embed Codex into Dell on-premises and hybrid enterprise infrastructure, giving regulated industries a secure path to deploy AI agents without routing sensitive data through the public cloud.

pull_quote.text: The Dell AI Factory with OpenAI Codex will allow enterprises to deploy AI where enterprise data already lives.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI and Dell Technologies announced a landmark multi-year partnership to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premises enterprise environments...

stories.headline: Standard Chartered Becomes First Major Bank to Tie 7,000 Job Cuts Directly to AI
stories.key_takeaway: Standard Chartered is the first major global bank to explicitly name AI as the direct cause of a scheduled 7,000+ job reduction, setting a template that peers will be pressured to match.

pull_quote.text: We do have job role reductions in favor of the machines, and that will accelerate as we go forward into AI.

stories.article_excerpt: Standard Chartered became the first major global bank to explicitly tie thousands of job cuts directly to artificial intelligence...

stories.headline: Google Halves AI Ultra Price to $100 Per Month at I/O 2026
stories.key_takeaway: Google cut its AI Ultra entry price from $249.99 to $100/month at I/O 2026, undercutting ChatGPT Pro by half and bundling Gemini Spark as the primary value driver.

pull_quote.text: Gemini Spark is your personal AI agent that helps you navigate your digital life, taking action on your behalf and under your direction.

stories.article_excerpt: Google made the most aggressive pricing move in the premium AI subscription war, slicing AI Ultra to $100 per month at I/O 2026...

stories.headline: Shyld AI Raises $13.4 Million to Bring Agentic AI Inside Hospital Operations
stories.key_takeaway: Shyld AI raised $13.4M to deploy agentic AI systems that physically act inside hospitals, achieving 93% contamination reduction in a Stanford study.

pull_quote.text: We are not building another dashboard for clinicians to check. We are building AI that acts.

stories.article_excerpt: Shyld AI raised $13.4 million in seed funding to deploy autonomous disinfection robots and agentic AI agents inside hospital operating rooms...

stories.headline: Runware Raises $50 Million Series A for Multi-Model AI Inference Platform
stories.key_takeaway: Runware closed a $50M Series A to scale its Sonic Inference Engine targeting 30-40% faster inference and up to 10x better price-performance than cloud GPU providers.

pull_quote.text: We are building a platform that can run AI faster, more cost-effectively, with higher redundancy and lower latency.

stories.article_excerpt: Runware closed a $50 million Series A led by Dawn Capital to scale its Sonic Inference Engine across global edge locations...

stories.headline: Google Unveils Gemini 3.5 as Its Most Capable Model at I/O 2026 Keynote
stories.key_takeaway: Gemini 3.5 Flash surpasses Google own prior Pro tier across virtually all benchmarks, runs 4x faster than competing frontier models, and is priced at $1.50/$9.00 per million tokens.

pull_quote.text: If they shifted 80% of their workloads from other frontier models to 3.5 Flash, they would save over $1 billion dollars annually.

stories.article_excerpt: Google opened I/O 2026 with the launch of Gemini 3.5 Flash, a model that surpasses its previous Pro-tier system across nearly every benchmark...

stories.headline: Google Launches Gemini Spark Always-On AI Agent to Run Your Digital Life
stories.key_takeaway: Gemini Spark is a 24/7 cloud-resident AI agent exclusive to the $100/month AI Ultra plan that operates while users are offline, integrating with Google Workspace and 30+ third-party services.

pull_quote.text: We are not building another chatbot. We are building something that works while you do other things.

data_points.label: AI Ultra plan with Spark access

stories.article_excerpt: Google unveiled Gemini Spark at I/O 2026, a cloud-resident always-on AI agent that runs 24/7 on dedicated Google Cloud infrastructure...

stories.headline: Google Merges Android and ChromeOS Into Aluminium OS at I/O 2026
stories.key_takeaway: Google unified Android and ChromeOS into Aluminium OS, an Android 17-based desktop platform with Gemini embedded at the kernel level, launching Googlebook hardware with five OEM partners this fall.

pull_quote.text: Googlebook is designed for Gemini Intelligence. It brings together the full Android app ecosystem, Chrome browser power, and Gemini embedded at the OS level.

data_points.label: OEM partners (Acer, ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo)

stories.article_excerpt: Google announced Aluminium OS at I/O 2026, a ground-up rebuild merging Android and ChromeOS into a unified AI-first desktop platform...

stories.headline: Google Brings AI Agents to Search in Its Biggest Overhaul in 25 Years
stories.key_takeaway: Google transformed Search from a retrieval tool into an execution engine with Gemini 3.5 Flash-powered multimodal search, persistent information agents, and agentic booking capabilities.

pull_quote.text: We are entering the era of Search agents, where you can easily create, customize and manage multiple AI agents for your many tasks, right in Search.

stories.article_excerpt: Google unveiled a sweeping transformation of Search at I/O 2026, replacing the familiar keyword bar with an AI-powered multimodal interface...

stories.headline: Google Previews Display-Free Android XR Glasses With Built-In Gemini at I/O
stories.key_takeaway: Google launched Android XR smart glasses in two tiers backed by Samsung, Warby Parker, Gentle Monster, and XREAL, directly challenging Meta Ray-Ban 82% smart glasses market share.

pull_quote.text: We want to build glasses that deliver help in the moment without taking you out of it.

stories.article_excerpt: Google pulled back the curtain on Android XR-powered intelligent eyewear at I/O 2026, lightweight display-free frames built with Samsung and fashion partners...

stories.headline: OpenAI Launches Daybreak for AI-Powered Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI Daybreak embeds GPT-5.5-Cyber and Codex Security into the software development lifecycle to detect, validate, and patch vulnerabilities before attackers exploit them.

pull_quote.text: AI-driven offensive security is going mainstream, and continuous testing is moving from competitive advantage to table stakes.

data_points.label: AI time to convert patch to exploit

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI launched Daybreak, a cybersecurity initiative embedding frontier AI models directly into vulnerability detection and remediation workflows...

stories.headline: Mandiant M-Trends 2026 Finds Exploits Now Arrive Before Patches as AI Accelerates Attacks
stories.key_takeaway: Mean time to exploit vulnerabilities is now negative seven days — attackers routinely exploit flaws before patches exist — driven by AI-accelerated attack tooling.

pull_quote.text: The pace at which systemic failures are now exploited has changed the math for defenders entirely.

data_points.label: Mean time to exploit (was +63 days in 2018)

stories.article_excerpt: The math governing cybersecurity defense has been inverted. Mandiant M-Trends 2026 finds mean time to exploit is now negative seven days...

stories.headline: Nature Study Reveals How State Media Control Systematically Warps LLM Training Data
stories.key_takeaway: A six-study Nature paper proves state-controlled media systematically infiltrates LLM training corpora, causing models to favor authoritarian governments when queried in those countries languages.

pull_quote.text: This is a democracy and governance issue, not just a technical issue.
pull_quote.role: Professor of Politics, New York University

data_points.label: State news vs Wikipedia ratio in Common Crawl
Human raters found pro-regime bias in Chinese

stories.article_excerpt: Ask a popular AI chatbot about China in English, then in Mandarin, and you may be talking to two fundamentally different minds...

stories.headline: Take It Down Act Reaches Full Enforcement as FTC Gains Power to Fine $53,000 Per Violation
stories.key_takeaway: As of May 19, 2026, the Take It Down Act enters full FTC enforcement: platforms have 48 hours to remove flagged deepfakes or face $53,088 per violation.

pull_quote.text: I cannot imagine any service wanting to risk that type of fine on edge cases or anything they cannot verify within 48 hours.

stories.article_excerpt: As of May 19, 2026, the Take It Down Act enters its enforcement phase with the FTC empowered to levy $53,088 fines per violation...

stories.headline: Security Experts Declare 2026 the Year of AI-Assisted Cyberattacks
stories.key_takeaway: AI has crossed from defensive tool to primary offensive weapon in 2026, with AI-generated zero-days, autonomous malware, and deepfake CEO fraud becoming mainstream attack vectors.

pull_quote.text: We are no longer talking about hackers who write malware. We are talking about operators who configure AI agents and walk away.
pull_quote.role: Head of Counter Adversary Operations, CrowdStrike

data_points.label: Lost in Arup deepfake video call fraud

stories.article_excerpt: A finance manager joins a routine video call with the CFO and colleagues. Every face on that call was synthetic. $25.6 million gone...
